name: Z-One 工作流引擎测试（赚钱主题）
description: 通过 IPC 创建赚钱工作流，测试列表/详情/启动/版本。聊天触发 workflow 模式单独测试。

cases.name: 创建赚钱工作流（7 节点 DAG）

params.code: (async () => { const wf = { id: 'test-wf-earn-001', name: '赚钱计划工作流', description: '定期监控市场趋势，分析赚钱策略，条件判断可行性', nodes: [ { id: 'n1', type: 'task', label: '市场调研', config: { agentPersona: '市场研究员', prompt: '调研热门赚钱方式', tools: ['search_web'] }, position: { x: 200, y: 50 } }, { id: 'n2', type: 'task', label: '策略分析', config: { agentPersona: '策略师', prompt: '分析赚钱策略', tools: [] }, position: { x: 200, y: 200 } }, { id: 'n3', type: 'condition', label: '可行性评估', config: { expression: 'true', branches: [{ label: '可行', edgeId: 'e3' }, { label: '不可行', edgeId: 'e4' }] }, position: { x: 200, y: 350 } }, { id: 'n4', type: 'task', label: '执行计划', config: { agentPersona: '执行者', prompt: '执行赚钱计划', tools: ['write_file'] }, position: { x: 100, y: 500 } }, { id: 'n5', type: 'task', label: '调整策略', config: { agentPersona: '优化师', prompt: '调整策略', tools: [] }, position: { x: 300, y: 500 } }, { id: 'n6', type: 'gateway', label: '汇总', config: { mode: 'any' }, position: { x: 200, y: 650 } }, { id: 'n7', type: 'task', label: '生成报告', config: { agentPersona: '报告员', prompt: '生成赚钱报告', tools: ['write_file'] }, position: { x: 200, y: 800 } } ], edges: [ { id: 'e1', source: 'n1', target: 'n2' }, { id: 'e2', source: 'n2', target: 'n3' }, { id: 'e3', source: 'n3', target: 'n4', condition: '可行' }, { id: 'e4', source: 'n3', target: 'n5', condition: '不可行' }, { id: 'e5', source: 'n4', target: 'n6' }, { id: 'e6', source: 'n5', target: 'n6' }, { id: 'e7', source: 'n6', target: 'n7' } ], sourceDeviceId: '_zone_cli', sourceSessionId: 'test-earn', createdAt: Date.now(), updatedAt: Date.now() }; const created = await window.api.workflow.create(wf); return JSON.stringify({ created: true, id: created.id, name: created.name, nodeCount: created.nodes.length, version: created.version }); })()

cases.name: 工作流列表页 — 卡片展示
工作流详情页 — DAG 可视化

params.code: (function() { const card = document.querySelector('.workflow-card'); if (card) { card.click(); return JSON.stringify({ clicked: true }); } return JSON.stringify({ clicked: false }); })()

cases.name: 工作流启动与运行状态

params.code: (async () => { const wf = await window.api.workflow.get('test-wf-earn-001'); if (!wf) return JSON.stringify({ error: 'Workflow not found' }); try { const r = await window.api.workflow.start(wf.id); return JSON.stringify({ started: true, workflowId: wf.id, name: wf.name }); } catch(e) { return JSON.stringify({ started: false, workflowId: wf.id, error: e.message || String(e) }); } })()

(async () => { const runs = await window.api.workflow.getRuns('test-wf-earn-001'); if (runs.length === 0) return JSON.stringify({ hasRuns: false }); const r = runs[0]; return JSON.stringify({ hasRuns: true, runId: r.id, status: r.status, nodeCount: Object.keys(r.nodeStates || {}).length }); })()

(async () => { const versions = await window.api.workflow.getVersions('test-wf-earn-001'); return JSON.stringify({ versionCount: versions.length, versions: versions.map(v => ({ v: v.version, log: v.changelog })) }); })()

cases.name: 聊天触发 workflow 模式

params.text: 帮我创建一个赚钱监控工作流，每隔1小时循环检查市场趋势，持续监控并优化策略，请直接输出workflow JSON。

params.code: (async () => { const list = await window.api.workflow.list(); return JSON.stringify({ totalWorkflows: list.length, names: list.map(w => w.name) }); })()
